title: Portfolio Architecture
description: How this portfolio is built: data-driven content, automated enrichment via GitHub Actions, and zero API keys reaching the browser.

nodes.label: Generate Diagram
nodes.sublabel: architecture.json to Kroki API to SVG

secrets.description: Stats.fm API Bearer token for music listening stats
Ticketmaster Discovery API key for event details, images, and ticket URLs
Auto-provisioned token scoped to this repository for Pages deployment
secrets.scope: Auto-provisioned and scoped to this repository

highlights.title: Data-Driven
highlights.description: All content — work history, music events, skills, and this diagram — is defined in JSON files. No hardcoded UI copy. Updating a JSON file is all it takes to change any part of the site.

highlights.title: Secret Hygiene
highlights.description: All external API keys are managed securely and never bundled into the React app or visible in the browser network tab.

highlights.title: Automated Enrichment
highlights.description: Music stats update weekly via Stats.fm. Concert setlists will enrich automatically via Setlist.fm on push. This diagram regenerates from architecture.json on every deploy.

highlights.title: Static Hosting, Dynamic Content
highlights.description: Deployed to GitHub Pages — a CDN with no server. All richness comes from CI/CD pre-computation. The browser reads only static JSON and SVG files.

highlights.title: AI-Augmented Pipeline (Phase 2)
highlights.description: The next phase replaces the deterministic Mermaid builder with a Claude API call. The architecture JSON becomes a prompt; Claude produces the diagram code. The API key stays server-side.
